name: Savannah Galbraith
ai_summary: Savannah Galbraith is a 25-year-old education student with early childhood coursework and experience caring for children from elementary to high school, plus infant caregiving. She seeks a part-time role in Queen Creek, AZ and emphasizes calm, logical conflict resolution and creating nurturing environments for child development.

I'm eager to partake in the process of helping children learn Thrive and grow and I absolutely cannot wait for my time to become a mother of children.

I think it is best in any workplace to address conflicts big or small major or minor in a logical and calm manner versus an irrational and emotional manner. So I believe it is best to address the conflict at hand directly, asked the instigator, what the conflict was and the reasoning for their actions. Ask them to apologize.
 To the victim and deescalate the situation by having them make a truce or separating them accordingly. And it is best to make sure everyone is understanding of what just happened and making sure everything is cool, calm and collected at the end of it.
